prompts.description: Remove OFF API integration and clean up related code
prompts.prompt: Remove all Open Food Facts (OFF) API integration from the NutriPlan codebase. This includes: (1) Delete any API route files related to OFF (e.g. /api/food-search, /api/off-*, or similar). (2) Remove any OFF-related fetch calls, imports, or utility functions across the codebase. (3) Remove any OFF-related environment variables from .env.example or documentation (do NOT touch .env.local). (4) Clean up any components or hooks that reference OFF API results or loading states. (5) Ensure the Claude-based nutrition and meal plan generation remains fully intact and untouched. (6) Run a search for 'openfoodfacts' and 'OFF' across all files to make sure nothing is missed. After cleanup, verify the build passes with: npm run build.
